title: Deep Horrors
description: Supports PojavLauncher. A horror modpack with the aim of finishing Botania, Farmer's Delight and Modern Industrialization.
body:
Survive, Craft, and Conquer in a Lite Horror Modpack This lightweight modpack combines the thrill of survival horror with the depth of crafting and automation. Face relentless monsters while advancing through Botania, Farmer's Delight, and Modern Industrialization. Equipped with armor and firearms, battle your way to mastery—all within a modpack optimized for PojavLauncher and requiring only 2GB of RAM. Perfect for adventurous players seeking a compact, engaging experience.
If you'd like to use Sodium on PojavLauncher, grab the mods sodium-con-edit, Indium, Reese's Sodium Options, Sodium Extra and Iris from the Haste modpack. If you are on another device, just grab the normal mods from modrinth and put them in the pack.
